name: inbox-log-lint
description: PostToolUse(Write|Edit) advisory for the INBOX domain log (`INBOX.log.md`). Fires when tool_input.file_path ends in `INBOX.log.md` and reads the post-write file to emit non-blocking additionalContext when the cross-project handoff log piles up: entry count (`## ` headers) > 20 (soft cap) · fully-resolved entries (>=1 `- [x]`, zero `- [ ]`) > 12 · non-blank lines > 250 — each suggests moving closed handoffs to a sibling `INBOX.archive.log.md` so the active log stays open + recent. Implemented in hexa-lang (`_inbox_log_lint.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`). Advisory-only by design (per the guards-narrow-scope policy: non-blocking additionalContext > deny for hygiene). Sister of memory-lint (same pattern for memory/MEMORY.md).
